tasks.label: commit-push
tasks.command:
npm install && git add -A && git commit -m 'feat(security): BYOK vault + per-adapter encrypted config + Helmet + mTLS schemas

- Add src/lib/secure-store.ts: BYOK credential vault with AES-GCM 256-bit
- Add src/lib/useSecureStore.ts: React hook for vault CRUD operations
- Add src/core/adapter-config-schemas.ts: Zod schemas for mTLS/EEBUS/OCPP
- Add Helmet security headers to server.ts (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options)
- Tighten CommandAuditEntry.value type, commandSchemas type (no any)
- Add Dexie v5 migration with adapterCredentials table
- Add i18n keys for vault/mTLS (EN + DE)' && git push
